## tscli get logs stream

Get log-streaming config or status

### Synopsis

Without flags this returns the log-streaming configuration.
Use --status to fetch the current stream status.

```
tscli get logs stream --type {configuration|network} [--status] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for stream
      --status        Fetch /status instead of /stream (shows runtime status)
      --type string   Log type: "configuration" or "network" (required)
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli get logs](tscli_get_logs.md)	 - Get logs for the tailnet
